turns.content: Add a retry mechanism to the HTTP client

📋 SUMMARY: Investigating the CachedHTTPClient before planning changes.

The CachedHTTPClient already has retry with exponential/linear/fixed backoff, circuit breaker, rate limiting, and request deduplication. I want to make sure I'm building the right thing.

🗣️ Kaya: CachedHTTPClient already has retry logic — clarifying what enhancement you need.
